descs.desc:
[BeforeUse] At max [MeursaultSporeBulletLong], inflict 1 [PenetrateTakeDamageUp] On Hit (once per turn)
[WhenUse] If target has 6+ ([Combustion] + [Laceration]), Coin Power +1

Deal +10% damage for every 5 [MeursaultBeeSpore] on target (max 30%)
[BeforeUse] At max [MeursaultSporeBulletLong], inflict 1 [PenetrateTakeDamageUp] On Hit (once per turn)
[WhenUse] Coin Power +1 for every 6 ([Combustion] + [Laceration]) on target (max 2)

Deal -50% damage against sub-targets
Deal +7% damage for every 5 [MeursaultBeeSpore] on target (max 21%)
[WhenUse] If the main target has 6+ ([Combustion] + [Laceration]), Coin Power +1

Deal -50% damage against sub-targets
Deal +15% damage for every 5 [MeursaultBeeSpore] on target (max 45%)
[WhenUse] If the main target has 6+ ([Combustion] + [Laceration]), Coin Power +1
[WhenUse] If this unit has [MeursaultWorkerBee], Clash Power +1
[WhenUse] Convert Coins equal to [MeursaultWorkerBee] into [SuperCoin]s, beginning with the final Coin
[EndSkill] At 1 or fewer [MeursaultSporeBulletLong], [MeursaultSporeBulletReloading]

Deal +5% damage for every 5 [MeursaultBeeSpore] on target (max 15%)
[WhenUse] Coin Power +1 for every 6 ([Combustion] + [Laceration]) on the main target (max 2)
[EndSkill] [MeursaultSporeBulletReloading]
coinDescs:
This Coin hits only a single Target (prioritizes the main target)
Spend 1 [MeursaultSporeBulletLong]
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 2 [Combustion]

This Coin hits only a single Target (prioritizes the main target)
Spend 1 [MeursaultSporeBulletLong]
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 2 [Laceration]

This Coin hits only a single Target (prioritizes the main target)
Spend 1 [MeursaultSporeBulletLong]
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 1 [Laceration]

[SuperCoin]
Spend 1 [MeursaultSporeBulletShort]
Deal -50% damage against sub-targets

[UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] If target's [MeursaultBeeSpore] is at max Stack, activate the following:
- Deal ([Combustion] Potency x [MeursaultBeeSpore] Stack / 10) Wrath damage (rounded down)
  - Dealing Wrath damage with this effect counts as activating [Combustion]
- Target loses 1 [Combustion] Count
- [MeursaultBeeSpore] on target expires

[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict +1 [Combustion] Count and +1 [Laceration] Count

descs.desc:
Deal +50% damage for every excess Atk Weight beyond the # of actual targets (for Focused Encounters, the part)
Deal +10% damage for every 5 [MeursaultBeeSpore] on target (max 30%)
[BeforeUse] At 2 or fewer [MeursaultSporeBulletLong], consume 6 SP to gain 3 [MeursaultSporeBulletLong]
[WhenUse] Coin Power +1 for every 6 ([Combustion] + [Laceration]) on the main target (max 3)
[WhenUse] If this unit has [MeursaultWorkerBee], Clash Power +1
[WhenUse] Convert Coins equal to [MeursaultWorkerBee] into [SuperCoin]s, beginning with the 3rd Coin
[WhenUse] At 3 [MeursaultWorkerBee], gain Atk Weight +1
[EndSkill] [MeursaultSporeBulletReloading]
coinDescs:
This Coin hits only a single Target (prioritizes the main target)
Spend 1 [MeursaultSporeBulletLong]
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 3 [Combustion]

This Coin hits only a single Target (prioritizes the main target)
Spend 1 [MeursaultSporeBulletLong]
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 2 [Laceration]

This Coin hits only a single Target (prioritizes the main target)
Spend 1 [MeursaultSporeBulletLong]
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 2 [Laceration]

[SuperCoin]
Spend 1 [MeursaultSporeBulletShort]
Deal -50% damage against sub-targets
This Coin deals +5% damage for every [MeursaultWorkerBee] on self (max 15%)

[UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] If target's [MeursaultBeeSpore] is at max Stack, activate the following:
- Deal ([Combustion] Potency x [MeursaultBeeSpore] Stack / 10) Wrath damage (rounded down)
  - Dealing Wrath damage with this effect counts as activating [Combustion]
- Target loses 1 [Combustion] Count
- [MeursaultBeeSpore] on target expires

[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict +1 [Combustion] Count and +2 [Laceration] Count

descs.desc:
[StartBattle][MeursaultSporeBulletReloading] (once per turn)
[OnSucceedEvade] Heal 10 HP (once per turn)

[StartBattle] [MeursaultSporeBulletReloading] (once per turn)
[WhenUseEvade] Coin Power +1 for every 6 ([Combustion] + [Laceration]) on the attacker (max 3)
[OnSucceedEvade] Heal 10 HP (once per turn)
- If this unit has [MeursaultWorkerBee], heal an additional 5 HP for every Stack

1051401.name: Spore Diffusion
1051401.desc: On Kill against targets with [MeursaultBeeSpore], inflict double the [MeursaultBeeSpore] for the next turn

1051411.name: Spore Diffusion
1051411.desc:
On Kill against targets with [MeursaultBeeSpore], gain the following effects:
- Inflict double the [MeursaultBeeSpore] for the next turn
- On Kill with a Base Attack Skill, gain (Spore Round the Skill spends / 2) Spore Round (rounded up; once per Skill)

1051402.name: E.G.O Alteration / Spore Round
1051402.desc:
Always Active: Begin Encounters with 10 [MeursaultSporeBulletLong] and 6 [MeursaultSporeBulletShort]

On Hit with Coins that spend Spore Round:
- If [MeursaultSporeBulletLong] was spent, inflict 2 [MeursaultBeeSpore]
- If [MeursaultSporeBulletShort] was spent, inflict 3 [MeursaultBeeSpore]
- This counts as "inflicting negative effects with the Skill"

Before Coin Use of a Coin that spends [MeursaultSporeBulletShort], if this unit does not have [MeursaultSporeBulletShort], consume 2 SP and 2 [MeursaultSporeBulletLong] to gain 1 [MeursaultSporeBulletShort]

If this unit runs out of Spore Round mid-Skill, cancel all subsequent Coins and [MeursaultSporeBulletReloading]

When targets with [MeursaultBeeSpore] are killed, gain 1 [MeursaultWorkerBee]

1051421.name: Worker Bee
1051421.desc:
Ally Pierce Base Attack Skill End: The said ally heals HP equal to 10% of HP damage dealt with the attack (2 times per Encounter)
- For this turn, if all Base Attack Skills equipped on allied Skill Slots are Pierce Skills, all allies heal 10 SP at Turn End
